name: THALCOR
title: THALCOR — Venture Studio for Experimental Companies
description: A venture studio building proof across intelligence systems, future hardware, consumer products, interactive worlds, creative IP, and practical infrastructure.
tagline: A venture studio for experimental companies, systems, products, and worlds.

homepage.headline: THALCOR
homepage.subheadline: A venture studio for experimental companies, systems, products, and worlds.
homepage.supporting: Thalcor turns ambitious concepts into proof — then turns proof into companies, products, worlds, and systems.
homepage.positioningTitle: A focused but ambitious lab — not a pile of ideas.
homepage.positioningIntro: Thalcor builds proof across seven connected program areas. Each concept has to become sharper, more testable, and easier for capital or talent to understand.
homepage.featuredProgramsTitle: Clear tracks for the strongest concepts.
homepage.featuredProgramsIntro: These are not random side projects. They are organized venture tracks with named use cases, public copy, and proof paths.
homepage.processTitle: Ideas become proof. Proof becomes opportunity.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.description: Specific THALCOR collaboration, investment, builder, manufacturing, and creative partnership inquiries.
contactPage.heading: Open a channel around a specific program.
contactPage.intro: Reach out when there is a focused collaboration, investment conversation, contractor capability, manufacturing path, or creative partnership worth discussing.
contactPage.panelText: Include the program area that interests you, what you can contribute, and what kind of proof or partnership you want to discuss.

contactCta.heading: Bring a serious signal.
contactCta.text: THALCOR is most interested in focused builders, technical operators, designers, funders, manufacturers, artists, and collaborators who can help turn proof into durable ventures.

processSteps.title: Filter
processSteps.text: Ideas are graded for originality, feasibility, defensibility, funding potential, execution cost, and founder fit before they earn attention.

processSteps.title: Build proof
processSteps.text: The studio turns concepts into artifacts: prototypes, landing pages, renders, tools, research briefs, demos, videos, and supplier maps.

processSteps.title: Package
processSteps.text: Strong signals become clearer venture opportunities with sharper positioning, use cases, partner paths, and next actions.

processSteps.title: Spin out
processSteps.text: The strongest projects can become companies, products, worlds, systems, or investable tracks with aligned talent and capital.
